title: Add a tab in the github modal issue import to
description: Add a tab in the github modal (issue import) to view pull requests (for a remote repo). select a pull request and create a task to "address issues in PR"

Frontend - Add Tab UI to GitHubImportModal

summary:
Added a "Pull Requests" tab to the GitHub Import Modal alongside the existing "Issues" tab. Users can now browse open PRs from a remote repository, select one, and create a kb review task titled "Review PR #N: ...". The implementation includes:

1. Backend: Added `listPullRequests` and `getPullRequest` methods to GitHubClient with gh CLI and REST API fallbacks
2. Backend: Added `/github/pulls/fetch` and `/github/pulls/import` endpoints following the existing patterns
3. Frontend: Added `apiFetchGitHubPulls` and `apiImportGitHubPull` API functions with `GitHubPull` interface
4. Frontend: Added tab UI with Issues/Pull Requests tabs, PR list with branch info, PR preview pane, and tab-aware import functionality
5. Tests: Added 14 new comprehensive tests covering PR tab switching, loading, selection, import, "already imported" badge, and error states

All 45 GitHubImportModal tests pass, build succeeds, and changeset created for patch release.
